channel.title: Visit North Yorkshire Yorkshire Events
channel.description: Upcoming Yorkshire events from Visit North Yorkshire.

item.title: Scarborough 400 - Maritime Heritage Centre
item.description: A special exhibition explaining the past 400 years of Scarborough Spa and the town.
item.location: Scarborough Maritime Heritage Centre, Scarborough Maritime Heritage Centre, 45 Eastborough, Scarborough, North Yorkshire, YO11 1PB
item.ify:location: Scarborough Maritime Heritage Centre, Scarborough Maritime Heritage Centre, 45 Eastborough, Scarborough, North Yorkshire, YO11 1PB
item.dc:creator: Visit North Yorkshire

item.title: Peasholm Park Naval Warfare - Battle of Peasholm
item.location: Peasholm Park, Peasholm Park, North Bay, Scarborough, YO12 7TR
item.ify:location: Peasholm Park, Peasholm Park, North Bay, Scarborough, YO12 7TR
item.dc:creator: Visit North Yorkshire

item.title: Summer Holidays - Ampleforth Adventures
item.description: join us this summer to reconnect with nature and enjoy the simple things in life - fresh air and room to play.
item.location: Ampleforth Abbey, Ampleforth Abbey, York, YO62 4EN, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
item.ify:location: Ampleforth Abbey, Ampleforth Abbey, York, YO62 4EN, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
item.dc:creator: Visit North Yorkshire

item.title: Theakston Old Peculier Crime Writing Festival
item.description: The Theakston Old Peculier Crime Writing Festival returns in July 2025! With the announcement of this years Special Guests, curated by Festival…
item.dc:creator: Visit North Yorkshire

item.title: Ard Rock Enduro
item.description: Head to Swalefale for the UK's biggest festival of mountain bike riding and the toughest Enduro stages you will find on these shores, explore the event…
item.location: Dales Bike Centre, Low Fremington, Richmond, DL11 6AW
item.ify:location: Dales Bike Centre, Low Fremington, Richmond, DL11 6AW
item.dc:creator: Visit North Yorkshire

item.title: Special Guests: Nadine Matheson & Steve Cavanagh - Old Swan Hotel
item.description: No one is above the law. And no one is below it. In the ever-twisting world of crime fiction however, people can be above, below and beyond the law, often…
item.location: The Old Swan Hotel, Old Swan Hotel, Swan Road, Harrogate, HG1 2SR
item.ify:location: The Old Swan Hotel, Old Swan Hotel, Swan Road, Harrogate, HG1 2SR
item.dc:creator: Visit North Yorkshire

item.title: Knaresborough Forest Community & Nature - A Stunning New Exhibition - Knaresborough Heritage Centre
item.description: Our current exhibition ‘Knaresborough Forest, Community & Nature‘ also has a unique Son et Lumière which is an impressive floor to ceiling sound and light…
item.location: Knaresborough Heritage Centre, Knaresborough Heritage Centre, 12 High Street, HG5 0EQ
item.ify:location: Knaresborough Heritage Centre, Knaresborough Heritage Centre, 12 High Street, HG5 0EQ
item.dc:creator: Visit North Yorkshire

item.title: Romeo & Juliet - Ripon Racecourse
item.description: Two hearts. One fate. A timeless love reborn. The Dukes Theatre Company presents Shakespeares Romeo and Juliet, a bold reimagining of the iconic tragedy…
item.location: Ripon Racecourse, Ripon Racecourse, Boroughbridge Road, HG4 1UG
item.ify:location: Ripon Racecourse, Ripon Racecourse, Boroughbridge Road, HG4 1UG
item.dc:creator: Visit North Yorkshire
